auth.error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.error_password_requirements: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character
auth.password_requirement: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character.
auth.registration_success: Registration successful! Check your email to verify your account.
auth.check_email_confirmation: Please check your email to confirm your account.
auth.reset_email_sent: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.email_only_info: We only support email registration to ensure your independence and privacy.
auth.email_only_intro: We believe in giving you full control over your account and data. By using email-based authentication, we ensure:
auth.email_only_benefit_1_desc: You're not dependent on third-party services like Google or Apple. Your account works independently.
auth.email_only_benefit_2_desc: We don't share your data with Google, Apple, or any other third party for authentication.
auth.email_only_benefit_3_desc: Your email address is portable and works across all devices and platforms.
auth.email_only_benefit_4_desc: We can reach you directly for important updates without relying on third-party notification systems.
auth.email_only_modal_footer: We're committed to building tools that respect your freedom and privacy. Email authentication is part of that commitment.
auth.terms_agreement: By using Memoro you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.mana_login_description: One login for all Mana apps
auth.mana_login_benefit_0: Use Mana subscriptions across all apps - pay once and use everything
auth.reset_password_description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.reset_password_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
auth.reset_email_sent_description: We've sent an email with instructions to reset your password to {email}. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.oauth_error_access_denied: Access denied. The login was cancelled.
auth.oauth_error_server_error: Server error during authentication. Please try again.
auth.oauth_error_temporarily_unavailable: The authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth.oauth_error_unsupported_response_type: Unsupported response type. Please contact support.
auth.oauth_error_unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

app_slider.title: More Manacore Apps
app_slider.memoro_long_desc: Transform your voice into organized, actionable insights with AI-powered transcription and analysis. Perfect for capturing ideas on the go.
app_slider.maerchenzauber_long_desc: Create personalized bedtime stories for your children with AI. Spark imagination and make every night magical with unique tales.
app_slider.manadeck_long_desc: Create and study with smart flashcards and AI-powered spaced repetition.
app_slider.moodlit_long_desc: Track and understand your emotions with AI-powered insights. Build emotional awareness and improve your mental wellbeing.
app_slider.manacore_long_desc: The central hub for all Manacore apps. Manage your subscriptions, sync data, and access powerful AI tools from one place.
